metadata.title:
s. UNIONS
IN LINE


Of MARCH

Allied Crafts Will BE Group
ed Together in the


Parade.

pages.raw_text:
All indications point to the Labor
day parade next Monday being tho
best and biggest turnout Of organ
lied labor ever seen In Spokane un-
der like circumstances. Every
union in the city, with possibly one
or two exceptions, OF those affiliate
ed with the Central Labor council
and the Building Trades council,
will be In line. A place In the
parade will be reserved for the
railroad workers II they care to
participate. In all, at least 65
unions will be represented.


This year new idea will be PUT
into effect in the parade ana that
Is the grouping of allied crafts into
sectional divisions. In the first
division will be the culinary and
provision workers, in another all
brewery workers, in another the
printing crafts, then . misccllane-
Gus section. including the federal
unions, a division of the metal
trades. and one for the building
trades. The railroad workers will
be taken care of II they care to
march.


At the head OF each section will
